title: Roman Anthony gives update on injured wrist: ‘Progressing a lot slower than I’d imagined’
author: Kaley Brown

title: How Gillette Stadium went from turf to grass for the World Cup, and what it could mean for the NFL
author: Sam Lattof
bullets: World Cup "The temporary installation of natural grass fields for the World Cup is a choice by certain NFL team owners to do for soccer players what they refuse to do for NFL players.
